calendar.matters:
CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel Bornstein, esq., (415)409-7611 for Plaintiff Debbie McKeever.
Laresa Brown, (415)844-0493 Defendant on her own behalf.

This matter is on calendar for Court trial assignment. Both parties are present and the Court rules that the matter will be heard in Department 501 forthwith.

10:36am The Court inquries if Debbie Mckeever has the authority to respresent the owner. Mr. Bornstein states that Ms. McKeever is the property manager for her father.

10:37am Opening statement by Daniel Bornstein counsel for the Plaintiff.

10:41am Opening statement by he Defendant Laresa Brown.

10:46am Debbie McKeever is sworn and examined.

The following exhibits are identified:
Plaintiff's 1-The Lease Agreement
Plaintiff's 3-April 2018 Warning Letter
Plaintiff's 4-60 Day notice (May 11, 2018-July 1, 2018)

Plaintiff seeks possession base on the 60 day notice; $66.83 daily damages from Jul-11-18 to the present and forfeiture of the lease and attorney's fees.

Plaintiff's 2-Packet of documents including the three day notice and late payment history is identified.

10:59am Mr. Bornstein ends his examination of Ms. McKeever.
Plaintiff's exhibits 1-4 are admitted into evidence.
The Defendant does not have any questions for the witness.

11:00am the witness is thanked and excused.

11:00am Laresa Browm is sworn and gives her statement.
Defendant's exhibit A are identified.

11:16am Mr. Bornstein cross examines Ms. Brown.

11:21am Plaintiff's 5-copy of one of the Defendant's bounced checks is identified and admitted into evidence.

11:23am The Court states that all evidence may be retuned after the appeal period is over. Both sides agree.

11:24am The matter is submitted.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 501

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Continued To Sep-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501
